channel.title: cs.LG updates on arXiv.org
channel.description: Machine Learning updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive

item.title: A Sample Paper on Gradient Methods
item.description: arXiv:2401.00001 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present a sample paper used as an integration-test fixture. arXiv renders it as native HTML, so fetch converts that HTML to markdown.
item.dc:creator: Ada Lovelace, Alan Turing

item.title: Another Sample Paper With No Markdown Available
item.description: arXiv:2401.00002 Announce Type: new Abstract: A second fixture paper with no arxiv HTML and a PDF-only e-print endpoint, so neither conversion path yields markdown.
item.dc:creator: Grace Hopper

item.title: A Third Sample Paper With LaTeX Source Only
item.description: arXiv:2401.00003 Announce Type: new Abstract: A third fixture paper with no arxiv HTML but a LaTeX e-print archive, exercising fetch's LaTeX-to-markdown fallback path.
item.dc:creator: Edsger Dijkstra
